final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing surrealist dreamscape illustration with philosophical depth and visual impact.

Style/medium: needs a surrealist dreamscape aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a giant moon rising from the sea, whales flying in the sky, melting clocks, and stairs leading to the clouds
Subject: must include the giant moon as a dominant visual element, flying whales, melting clocks, and cloud-reaching stairs
Scene/backdrop: must include the sea below and sky above with surreal spatial relationships
Lighting/mood: needs a dreamlike, philosophical atmosphere — exact light source and mood balance is yours
Color palette: needs a surreal direction — exact color choices and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a dreamlike surface treatment — exact material qualities are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
